description: The 10 platform skill keys. Reused verbatim — NOT a new list. Source of truth: business-library/schema.ts → skillKeySchema (also src/features/business-engine's RequiredSkill.key vocabulary and src/features/knowledge-engine's Skills domain, which reuses this same skillKeySchema — see knowledge-engine/types/reused-vocabularies.ts). Note: this is a different, narrower vocabulary from features/business-dna's Skill DNA (12 keys, 1-10 scale) — see that feature's README for the documented conflict.
